Швидкий перехід

— Ruby вакансії
🚪 Вихід

  • Перша робота

  • Відгуки
  • Додати компанію
ПУМБ (First Ukrainian International Bank) Всі вакансії компанії
IT Life is possible in the bank! We develop a number of systems that provide to customers and partners with remote banking services. We use Angular 5, React 16.x, HTML5, CSS3, LESS on the front-end, middleware software for management business processes, and failover backend based on Java EE and .NET services.
  • Всі вакансії / .NET / Київ
8 травня 2026

Creatio (.NET) Lead Developer

Київ, за кордоном, віддалено $4500–5000

We’re building a next‑generation financial leasing ecosystem on Creatio — not just a CRM, but a unified platform that connects business processes, customer experience, and modern digital channels. To accelerate our growth, we’re looking for a Creatio Team Lead who will drive technical excellence and help scale the product.

It is better to examine it firsthand  ПУМБ — YouTube

💡 About the Project

Our core solution is a Creatio‑based platform that automates the full financial leasing lifecycle — from application to contract servicing. And we’re expanding fast:

📱 Mobile app (Flutter) 🌐 Web portal (Angular) 🔗 Integrations with external services via API

👥 The Team

You’ll join a strong cross‑functional team of 14 specialists:

  • Backend & frontend developers
  • Business analysts
  • QA engineers
  • DevOps

The team is established and motivated — now it needs a strong technical leader.

🎯 What You’ll Do

  • Lead development on Creatio
  • Design and evolve the system architecture
  • Mentor and grow the engineering team
  • Collaborate closely with business stakeholders and analysts
  • Build the foundation for future mobile and web solutions

🛠️ What We’re Looking For

  • 1+ year of experience as a Team Lead
  • 3+ years of hands‑on experience with Creatio
  • Strong knowledge of:
    • C#, .NET
    • JavaScript, ExtJS
    • REST API
    • SQL (MS SQL Server)
  • Understanding of:
    • HTTP, XML/JSON
    • SDLC (Agile / Scrum)
  • Experience with CI/CD (e.g., Jenkins) and Git

⭐ Why This Role Is Exciting

  • You influence the product from the ground up
  • A diverse tech landscape: CRM + mobile + web
  • A team you can shape and develop
  • Freedom to make architectural and technical decisions

🌟 Why 7,000 Employees Have Chosen Us

  • Growth every day: structured career development, internal training programs, and opportunities to gain new skills.
  • A supportive, inspiring team: a professional environment where your ideas matter and collaboration is the norm.
  • Flexibility that works for you: hybrid format, flexible schedule, and the ability to balance productivity with comfort.
  • Wellbeing matters: table tennis, psychological support, and legal assistance to help you stay balanced.
  • Meaningful impact: participation in social initiatives that make a real difference and add purpose to your work.
  • A culture of trust: mistakes are treated as learning opportunities, and achievements are celebrated together.
  • Modern tools & technologies: everything you need to work efficiently and enjoy the process.

Andrey Kuluev | andreykuluev96@gmail.com | 0950558145 (редагувати)
Скасувати

  • Lead Backend Engineer в DraftKings, Remote Ukraine, віддалено
  • Product Engineer в Informed Decisions, віддалено
  • Creatio (.NET) Lead Developer в ПУМБ, $4500–5000, Київ, за кордоном, віддалено

Схожі вакансії

  • Oracle/.Net Software Engineer в Bank Pivdenny, Київ, Одеса, віддалено
  • Senior .NET Engineer (AWS) в EPAM, Київ, Харків, Львів, Дніпро, Одеса, Вінниця, Івано-Франківськ, Хмельницький, Ужгород, Черкаси, Чернівці, віддалено
  • Senior/Lead .NET Software Engineer (AWS) в EPAM, Київ, Харків, Львів, Дніпро, Одеса, Вінниця, Івано-Франківськ, Хмельницький, Ужгород, Черкаси, Чернівці, віддалено
  • Middle-Senior .NET/Blazor Engineer в NCube, Київ, за кордоном, віддалено
  • Tech Lead (.NET, AI-driven) в Kozak Group, Київ, віддалено
  • Senior Backend Developer в LOGITY TECH, Київ, Львів, за кордоном, віддалено
  • Senior Software Engineer в SE Ranking, Київ, Варшава (Польща), Вроцлав (Польща), віддалено
  • Senior .NET Developer (Web Services) в Airlogix, Київ
